3193620.name: Lost Connection
3193620.description: Lost Connection is a short visual novel following the events that take place between a space station in peril and the skeleton command crew back on Earth charged with supporting it's mission. Follow along as the plot develops by reading text dialog between the characters and making choices to advance the story and change the outcome of various scenes. Enjoy a casual, short, and emotional science fiction story following two main characters with lovely character and background art by Mish, and stunningly moody music by Larissa Randall.
3193620.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
